series_metadata.series_title: SAIC/STACC Intelligence Products and Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Unclassified intelligence products produced by the Strategic Analysis and Information Center (SAIC) and the Statewide Terrorism Analysis and Crime Center (STACC) for information sharing and dissemination including, but not limited to, bulletins, non-infrastructure assessments, and process tracking documents.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: five years from review and validation. ; Electronic: five years from review and validation
